message:
refactor(google-docs): migrate client to fcp-google-discovery REST executor

Replace hand-rolled reqwest::Client + ApiErrorResponse handling with
the shared fcp-google-discovery substrate (GoogleRestExecutor,
GoogleExecuteRequest, GoogleApiError). Rename map_api_error →
map_google_api_error and update 5 unit tests to match.

Aligns google-docs with the other Google connectors that already use
the shared Google auth/retry infrastructure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
